<!--
Thanks for contributing to RolloMap! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR is easiest to review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If there's no issue, briefly explain the motivation. -->

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, manual steps, screenshots for UI changes.
     Remember to redact any personal data from screenshots/logs. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`README.md` / `docs/`)
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or credentials committed
- [ ] Database migrations (if any) are noted in this description
